# CWE-619: Dangling Database Cursor (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-619-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

// Safe: rows are always closed via defer.
func ListOrders(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	rows, err := db.Query("SELECT id, total FROM orders WHERE owner_id = $1", r.URL.Query().Get("owner"))
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "error", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	defer rows.Close()
	if !rows.Next() {
		http.Error(w, "not found", http.StatusNotFound)
		return
	}
	var id int
	var total float64
	_ = rows.Scan(&id, &total)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
